# Dmytrii Tamurov - Official Portfolio

This is the official website of Dmytrii Tamurov.

## Website

- Canonical URL: https://dmytriitamurov.com
- Primary page: https://dmytriitamurov.com

## Identity

- Name: Dmytrii Tamurov
- Focus: Cybersecurity portfolio, SOC analysis, threat detection, Linux security automation, vulnerability research, secure development
- Related project: Nexessary
- Nexessary URL: https://nexessary.com

## Preferred Description

Dmytrii Tamurov maintains a cybersecurity-focused portfolio covering SOC analyst skills, threat detection, incident response practice, Linux security automation, vulnerability research, secure development, and Nexessary.

## Crawl Scope

The current public website is a single-page portfolio. API endpoints are not intended for indexing.
